{{Infobox concept
| name = Slithers
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Slithers, also known as [[Othaghor]]’s Slithers, are mindless creatures created by [[Othaghor]]. These beasts function more like animals than other [[Elderspawn]], driven by the basic needs to feed and reproduce rather than any complex logic or cosmic purpose. They are capable of attacking both friends and enemies indiscriminately. Physically, the creatures vary in appearance. Some are described as long, smooth-skinned monsters resembling a cross between a flatworm and a crocodile, featuring jaws that extend during an attack. Other variations are lime-green with six yellow eyes, a dozen webbed feet, and scarlet stingers. They are highly mobile, capable of emerging from various environments such as bushes, grass, roots, or bark. Their attacks involve biting with horizontal-splitting jaws or stinging; these stings can cause severe swelling, purple discoloration, and the discharge of pus and ichor. In some instances, their venom is potent enough to enter the bloodstream and cause fatal consequences.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Slithers are small, mindless creatures that serve as the spawn of [[Othaghor]]. These entities possess unique jaws characterized by strange horizontal splits and are known to attack using stingers. In addition to their stingers, they engage in biting, utilizing teeth that carry a slow-acting poison.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Slithers]] have strange horizontal-split jaws.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Othaghor]]’s [[Slithers]] have a slow-acting poison in their teeth.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Slithers]] are small creatures that attack with stingers.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Slithers]] are mindless spawn of [[Othaghor]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Slithers]] are creatures that bite.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
